Primary Issue: Very weak retention score and high churn exposure
Recommended Action: Immediate retention outreach and personalized intervention

Primary Issue: Weak loyalty signals and elevated churn risk
Recommended Action: Targeted engagement campaign and relationship strengthening

Primary Issue: Average retention behavior with potential movement in either direction
Recommended Action: Monitor movement and improve product engagement

Primary Issue: Strongest loyalty and lowest churn risk
Recommended Action: Reward loyalty and use as benchmark segment

Primary Issue: High product load with very high churn behavior
Recommended Action: Simplify product experience and detect product dissatisfaction

Primary Issue: Low engagement and limited product relationship
Recommended Action: Activate engagement and introduce relevant product education

Primary Issue: High-value customers with churn warning signals
Recommended Action: Assign priority retention monitoring and personalized offers

Primary Issue: Strong active customers with healthy retention behavior
Recommended Action: Maintain loyalty experience and use for retention benchmarking
